reasoning: We're focusing on your lactate clearance limiter. Your last ride showed a low power output with high heart rate, which underscores the need to improve your fatigue resistance and aerobic base. Tackling Emigration Canyon with structured over-unders will specifically prepare you for the demands of the Alpine Loop's challenging climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 minutes: 4x (2 minutes at 242-256W, 1 minute at 201-218W). 3 minutes recovery between each set.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
